ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Continued To Mar-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Donald Misumi in Propria Persona.

The Court raised the issue of the disclaimers giving the Children an interest in the property and the issue of notice. The accounting petition was continued to March 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Misumi to obtain legal assistance.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Brown.
